overall.description: A first-person exploration through a Southeast Asian stilt village rendered in a game engine, beginning inside a traditional wooden house, moving through covered porches and along elevated wooden walkways past villagers processing fish, and ending at a waterfront area with traditional architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden stilt house interior with woven floor mats

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through the interior rooms of a wooden house, observing the living space and furnishings

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on floor mat facing a child
villager sitting on bench near the window

entered.detail: dark timber walls with visible grain and construction joints
multi-paned window allowing bright sunlight to stream in
woven mats and cushions arranged for sitting on the bamboo floor
wooden ceiling fan mounted on exposed beam ceiling
bundles of dried plants or food hanging from ceiling hooks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a traditional wooden stilt house with bamboo flooring and exposed timber beams. Sunlight streams through large windows, illuminating floor cushions where villagers sit. The camera moves through the interior space, passing wooden cabinets and hanging dried goods, creating a warm, lived-in atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered porch with thatched roof and bamboo railings

events.description: exits the interior house through a doorway onto a covered wooden porch

agents.ego_description: stepping out from the dim interior onto a sunlit covered porch area

notable_agents.action: villager working at a low wooden table processing materials
villager standing near bamboo railing overlooking the village

entered.detail: palm leaf thatched roof providing shade over the porch area
woven bamboo fencing enclosing the porch perimeter
low wooden table with tools and materials for craft work

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the interior, the scene opens onto a covered porch with a thatched palm roof and bamboo railings. Villagers work at low wooden tables while sunlight filters through the structure. The wooden deck extends outward, connecting to the broader village walkway system.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated village walkway with fish drying and processing area

events.description: moves from covered porch into open village square with stilt houses
passes through active fish drying area with racks of hanging fish

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated wooden walkways through the village center, passing working villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on small stool cleaning and preparing fish
villager arranging fish on drying racks

entered.detail: traditional wooden stilt houses with thatched roofs on bamboo poles
bamboo structures with rows of fish hanging to dry in the sun
silver fish strung on lines drying in the open air
large wooden barrels and woven baskets for storage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bustling village center with elevated wooden walkways connecting stilt houses. Villagers work at fish drying racks, hanging and processing the day's catch. Bamboo fences and scaffolding create a layered environment, while the wooden walkways extend over water channels below.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront area with traditional gate and wooden water wheel

events.description: approaches and passes through a large bamboo gate structure
reaches waterfront area with flooded walkways and water wheel

agents.ego_description: entering a secondary building through a bamboo gate then proceeding toward the water's edge

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional dress walking ahead through the gate
villager working near the water wheel mechanism

entered.detail: large woven bamboo archway marking entrance to waterfront area
large wooden water wheel turning slowly in the water channel
wooden walkway partially submerged in murky water
tall palm trees rising above the stilt houses

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a bamboo gate structure into a waterfront area. A large wooden water wheel turns slowly in the water channel beside flooded walkways. Palm trees rise above the traditional architecture, and villagers move about their daily tasks near the water's edge, completing the exploration of this riverside settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate interior of a traditional stilt house out into the bustling activity of a riverside village. It begins inside a wooden home with bamboo flooring and exposed beams, moving past floor cushions and hanging goods illuminated by streaming sunlight. As the camera exits the interior, the scene opens onto a covered porch with a thatched palm roof where villagers work at low tables before the path extends onto a network of elevated wooden walkways. The perspective then shifts into the village center, gliding past fish drying racks and layered bamboo scaffolding that stretch over water channels. Finally, the camera passes through a bamboo gate into a waterfront area, where a slowly turning wooden water wheel and towering palm trees frame the traditional architecture at the water's edge.
